column1: Alex___________pick up that heavy box. He is going to hurt his back.
You___________be nervous. You revised well for the test.
We__________panic. There is still plenty of time to get there.
They___________wear their sunglasses or they will get sore eyes.
I think I am getting a cold. I____________take some vitamin C tablets.
She________to the doctor. She doesn't look well.
Paula__________worry. She always does well at Math.
If you are tired, you____________go to bed early tonight.
